name: Laravel Bitnami
desc: PHP framework starter image with writable project volume and Laravel-ready presets from Bitnami
defaultEnv:
APP_NAME=Laravel
APP_ENV=production
APP_DEBUG=false
APP_URL=http://localhost:8001
LARAVEL_DATABASE_HOST=mysql
LARAVEL_DATABASE_PORT_NUMBER=3306
LARAVEL_DATABASE_NAME=laravel
LARAVEL_DATABASE_USER=laravel
LARAVEL_DATABASE_PASSWORD=secret
defaultCommand: sh -c 'cd /bitnami/laravel && if [ ! -f artisan ]; then echo "Laravel not found, initializing..."; composer create-project laravel/laravel .; fi && until php artisan migrate --force; do echo Waiting-DB...; sleep 5; done && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8000'

presets.name: Development
presets.desc: Enable debug mode and local-style environment values
presets.defaultEnv:
APP_NAME=Laravel
APP_ENV=local
APP_DEBUG=true
APP_URL=http://localhost:8001
LARAVEL_DATABASE_HOST=mysql
LARAVEL_DATABASE_PORT_NUMBER=3306
LARAVEL_DATABASE_NAME=laravel
LARAVEL_DATABASE_USER=laravel
LARAVEL_DATABASE_PASSWORD=secret
presets.defaultCommand: sh -c 'cd /bitnami/laravel && if [ ! -f artisan ]; then echo "Laravel not found, initializing..."; composer create-project laravel/laravel .; fi && until php artisan migrate --force; do echo Waiting-DB...; sleep 5; done && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8000'

presets.name: Production
presets.desc: Hardened defaults for long-running production containers
presets.defaultEnv:
APP_NAME=Laravel
APP_ENV=production
APP_DEBUG=false
APP_URL=https://example.com
LARAVEL_DATABASE_HOST=mysql
LARAVEL_DATABASE_PORT_NUMBER=3306
LARAVEL_DATABASE_NAME=laravel
LARAVEL_DATABASE_USER=laravel
LARAVEL_DATABASE_PASSWORD=secret
presets.defaultCommand: sh -c 'cd /bitnami/laravel && if [ ! -f artisan ]; then echo "Laravel not found, initializing..."; composer create-project laravel/laravel .; fi && until php artisan migrate --force; do echo Waiting-DB...; sleep 5; done && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8000'
